Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(s\);const n=j.vulnerabilities?.next;console.log\(n?\('next STILL flagged: '+n.severity+' range '+n.range\):'next: CLEAN \(no advisory\)'\);console.log\('totals:',JSON.stringify\(j.metadata.vulnerabilities\)\);console.log\('remaining pkgs:',Object.keys\(j.vulnerabilities||{}\).join\(', '\)||'none'\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const j=JSON.parse\(s\);for\(const[k,v]of Object.entries\(j.vulnerabilities||{}\)\){const direct=\(v.via||[]\).filter\(x=>typeof x!=='string'\);const inherited=\(v.via||[]\).filter\(x=>typeof x==='string'\);let line=k+': '+v.severity;if\(direct.length\)line+=' | DIRECT: '+direct.map\(d=>d.title\).join\('; '\);if\(inherited.length\)line+=' | inherited from: '+inherited.join\(','\);console.log\(line\);}}\)")
